calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Lorece Chanel Lundy, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Athena Tobie and Tionnee Nathan sued as Tionee Nathan.
Exhibit 1- Lease Agreement------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Forteen-Day Notice---------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Declaration of Service-----------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 271 Blythdale Ave., San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $6,936.00
Holdover Damages $2,061.42
Costs $200.00, for a Total of $9,197.42
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Kristi Rosi, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Kendra Crawford, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Cindy Lee representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Athena Tobie is present.
Defendant Tionee Nathan is not present.
Candace Xanttopoulos representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of September 17, 2007 remains set.
